name: scene_nodes_dissect_smoke
description: End-to-end Scene Nodes asset-discovery surface: drop a bare Capsule + Scene Nodes Generator, dissect them, then list discovered + repository assets. Locks the scene_nodes_dissect_capsule + scene_nodes_list_assets + scene_nodes_add_node handlers added 2026-04-29 for cracking open the asset-browser ecosystem and building our own graphs. Steps with empty assert lists rely on the runner's automatic ok/error fail-fast.

args.script:
import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['TestCapsule', 'TestSNGenerator']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
cap = c4d.BaseObject(5171)
if cap is not None:
    cap.SetName('TestCapsule')
    doc.InsertObject(cap)
gen = c4d.BaseObject(180420700)
if gen is not None:
    gen.SetName('TestSNGenerator')
    doc.InsertObject(gen)
c4d.EventAdd()
print(f'setup: capsule={cap is not None}, sn_generator={gen is not None}')

import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['TestCapsule', 'TestSNGenerator']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('teardown ok')
